audit_items.proof_trace: The header file rpc_client_impl.h contains no pointer dereferences — it only declares member functions and defines the FlowControlItem struct whose operator< compares only the integer token field. The raw stream pointer stored in FlowControlItem is populated in rpc_client_impl.cc exclusively from non-null RpcClientStreamPtr shared_ptrs (constructed via new RpcClientStream), and the shared_ptrs in live_streams remain alive for the entire duration of TimerMaintain, keeping all raw pointer accesses valid.
